scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w client-admin
scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client & wait'
scripts.dev:admin:full: sh -c 'npm run dev:server & npm run dev:admin & wait'
scripts.dev:all: sh -c 'npm run dev:server & npm run dev:client & npm run dev:admin & wait'
